name: PERSISTENCE OF STAPEDIAL ARTERY
definition: rare congenital vascular anomaly due to failure of regression of the embryonic stapedial
dominant_finding: enlarged / separate tympanic segment of facial nerve canal
discriminating_features: enlarged / separate tympanic segment of facial nerve canal
abnormal linear soft-tissue density crossing over cochlear promontory
absence of normal origin of middle meningeal artery

general: enlarged / separate tympanic segment of facial nerve canal
abnormal linear soft-tissue density crossing over cochlear promontory
absence of normal origin of middle meningeal artery
